{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = White Fox pillars
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The four [[White Fox pillars]] crumbled to rubble when [[Markuth]] called on the [[vital aura]] of the world.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c10">''Unsouled'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
